name: Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small nonmetal bowl, micro-cook butter or margarine on 100% power for 20 to 30 seconds or until melted.
2. Stir in the beaten egg, corn syrup, sugar, and flour.
3. Micro-cook uncovered on 50% power for 3 to 3 1/2 minutes or until slightly thickened, stirring every 30 seconds.
4. Stir in vanilla extract.
5. Pour into a pecan pie pastry shell.
6. Arrange pecan halves atop the pie.
7. Micro-cook uncovered on 30% power for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes or until set, rotating the dish a quarter-turn every minute.
8. Cool before serving.
